name: Playwright Website Scraper
description: Headless Playwright-based website crawler for JS-heavy or SPA sites. Starting from a root URL, discovers and renders pages client-side to capture full HTML, text, and key metadata. Use this for deep content and structure analysis when the site relies heavily on client-side rendering, and as a complement to scrape-agentbrowser and scrape-bs4 in comprehensive audits.

maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages (optional); deep mode uses 9999

deep.description: If true, discover all pages first then scrape each (no limit)

parallel.description: If true (with deep), run discovery and scraper threads in parallel; scraper skips URLs containing 'blog'
